articles.title: Back button hijacking to be penalised in Google crackdown - bbc.com
articles.description: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
articles.content: Adam Thompson, director of digital at BCS, the Chartered Institute for IT, told the BBC: "Practices like back button hijacking undermine the basic user experience and break the expectations people ha… [+123 chars]
